---
title: "C | Thema 3"
format: live-html
engine: knitr  
status: "Version 0.1"
lang: de 
---

{{< include _extensions/r-wasm/live/_knitr.qmd >}}
 
##  CFA mit kategoralen Indikatoren (ML vs. WLSMV)

```{webr}
#| warning: false
#| echo: false

webr::install("quadprog",  repos = "https://kroehne.github.io/webr-quadprog-repo")
 
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(mnormt))
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(lavaan))
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(lavaanPlot))  
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(psych))  
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(DT))

assignInNamespace("lav_options_checkinterval", function(x, nm, num2int) {
    if (any(is.na(x))) return(TRUE)
    if (num2int) x <- as.integer(x)                                                                                              
    oks <- vapply(x, function(x1) {
      (x1 > nm$bounds[1] || (x1 == nm$bounds[1] && nm$first.in)) &&                                                              
      (x1 < nm$bounds[2] || (x1 == nm$bounds[2] && nm$last.in))                                                                  
    }, TRUE)
    all(oks)                                                                                                                     
  }, ns = "lavaan")
 
View <- function(dat){
  dat_name <- deparse(substitute(dat))
  df_display <- dat |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    dplyr::across(everything(), ~ ifelse(is.na(.x), "❌ (NA)", .x))
  )
  
  DT::datatable(
    df_display,
    rownames = FALSE, 
    options = list(
      pageLength = 5,
      scrollX = TRUE,
      dom = 'tip',   
      columnDefs = list(list(className = 'dt-center', targets = "_all"))
    ),
    caption = htmltools::tags$caption(
      style = 'caption-side: top; text-align: left;',
      'data.frame: ', htmltools::strong(dat_name)
    )
  )  
}
```

### Präsentation

```{webr}
#| warning: false
#| echo: true
# ============================================================ 
# Thema 03: CFA mit kategoralen Indikatoren (WLSMV-Schätzung)
# Datensatz: psych::bfi (N=2800, 25 Items, 6-stufig)
# ============================================================

library(lavaan)
library(lavaanPlot)

data(bfi, package = "psych")
dat <- bfi[complete.cases(bfi[, 1:25]), 1:25]

# Umpolen
dat$A1 <- 7 - dat$A1
dat$C4 <- 7 - dat$C4; dat$C5 <- 7 - dat$C5
dat$E1 <- 7 - dat$E1; dat$E2 <- 7 - dat$E2
dat$O2 <- 7 - dat$O2; dat$O5 <- 7 - dat$O5

model_5f <- '
  A =~ A1 + A2 + A3 + A4 + A5
  C =~ C1 + C2 + C3 + C4 + C5
  E =~ E1 + E2 + E3 + E4 + E5
  N =~ N1 + N2 + N3 + N4 + N5
  O =~ O1 + O2 + O3 + O4 + O5
'

# ---- PRÄSENTATION: ML vs. WLSMV ----

# ML-Schätzung (Items als kontinuierlich)
fit_ml <- cfa(model_5f, data = dat, estimator = "ML")
summary(fit_ml, fit.measures = TRUE, standardized = TRUE)

# WLSMV-Schätzung (Items als ordinal)
ord_vars <- names(dat)
fit_wlsmv <- cfa(model_5f, data = dat, estimator = "WLSMV",
                 ordered = ord_vars)
summary(fit_wlsmv, fit.measures = TRUE, standardized = TRUE)


compare_fit <- data.frame(
  Index = c("chisq", "df", "cfi", "tli", "rmsea", "srmr"),
  ML = round(fitMeasures(fit_ml, c("chisq", "df", "cfi", "tli", "rmsea", "srmr")), 3),
  WLSMV = round(fitMeasures(fit_wlsmv, c("chisq", "df", "cfi", "tli", "rmsea", "srmr")), 3)
)
print(compare_fit)

# Vergleich der Faktorladungen
lambda_ml <- standardizedSolution(fit_ml)[standardizedSolution(fit_ml)$op == "=~", ]
lambda_wlsmv <- standardizedSolution(fit_wlsmv)[standardizedSolution(fit_wlsmv)$op == "=~", ]
cbind(Item = lambda_ml$rhs, ML = round(lambda_ml$est.std, 3),
      WLSMV = round(lambda_wlsmv$est.std, 3))

# Faktorinterkorrelationen
cat("\nML Faktorkorrelationen:\n")
print(round(lavInspect(fit_ml, "cor.lv"), 3))
cat("\nWLSMV Faktorkorrelationen:\n")
print(round(lavInspect(fit_wlsmv, "cor.lv"), 3))
```

## Bericht

```{webr}
#| warning: false
#| echo: true
# ---- BERICHT: Einfluss der Kategorienanzahl ----

# Dichotomisieren (Median-Split)
dat_dich <- as.data.frame(lapply(dat, function(x) ifelse(x >= 4, 1, 0)))
fit_wlsmv_2 <- cfa(model_5f, data = dat_dich, estimator = "WLSMV",
                    ordered = names(dat_dich))

# 3-stufig (1-2, 3-4, 5-6)
dat_3 <- as.data.frame(lapply(dat, function(x) {
  ifelse(x <= 2, 1, ifelse(x <= 4, 2, 3))
}))
fit_wlsmv_3 <- cfa(model_5f, data = dat_3, estimator = "WLSMV",
                    ordered = names(dat_3))

# Vergleichstabelle
cat_compare <- data.frame(
  Kategorien = c("6-stufig (Original)", "3-stufig", "Dichotom"),
  CFI = c(fitMeasures(fit_wlsmv, "cfi"),
          fitMeasures(fit_wlsmv_3, "cfi"),
          fitMeasures(fit_wlsmv_2, "cfi")),
  RMSEA = c(fitMeasures(fit_wlsmv, "rmsea"),
            fitMeasures(fit_wlsmv_3, "rmsea"),
            fitMeasures(fit_wlsmv_2, "rmsea"))
)
cat_compare[, -1] <- round(cat_compare[, -1], 3)
print(cat_compare)
# → Referenz: Rhemtulla, Brosseau-Liard & Savalei (2012)
 
```
